title: Milarepa: Song on the Nature of Mind
description: Milarepa sings to a disciple about the nature of mind: clear, luminous, and free from the beginning.
introduction: Milarepa sings to a disciple about the nature of mind: clear, luminous, and free from the beginning.

translation.text: Mind in its true nature is clear light. Thoughts are its play. Do not chase them or reject them.
